products.description:
Celebrating forty-five years of Hello Kitty comes this shocking, superb collaboration that's literally heavy-duty cute: the Chogokin Hello Kitty! It's a tag-team between Bandai and Sanrio, incorporating all of the heavy diecast that Chogokin fans demand with the subtle curves of a truly iconic character. Rendered in a perfect mascot size, it features plenty of cool diecast metal and ratcheted neck-joint for a retro click-y feel! The coloring and accessories are based on Kitty's very first appearance from 45 years ago. Once you pick her up, you won't be able to put her down! Accessories include a milk bottle, goldfish bowl, Chogokin logo, and stand.

It stands approx. 6 cm tall and comes in a printed box.

The hatches open to reveal manipulator arms, it can transform between bipedal and tripedal modes, and eight LEDs illuminate to capture R2-D2's trademark expressions. The plastic and diecast figure includes a cover for use when in bipedal mode, a stand, and a droid control bolt.

CHOGOKIN’s transformation technology will leave you in wonder as Hatsune Miku turns into Rody and back again! Of course a Hatsune Miku product wouldn’t be complete with out leek accessories (x2) and a keyboard.
